description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a modular design, featuring three main seating sections arranged in an L-shape with a chaise lounge extension. The upholstery is a smooth, solid light gray fabric, giving it a contemporary and neutral appearance suitable for urban environments. The sofa has low, straight backrests and armrests that are integrated into the frame, providing a streamlined silhouette. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size and appear to be attached, contributing to a clean and cohesive look. The legs are slender, metallic, and slightly tapered, elevating the sofa above the ground and enhancing its modern aesthetic. Overall, the sofa is designed for comfort and style, making it ideal for public spaces, lobbies, or upscale outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern, light gray sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, low straight backrests, integrated armrests, and slender metallic legs. The design is sleek and modular, with uniform attached cushions and a smooth fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped sectional layout, with all seat and back cushions visible and the integrated armrests at both ends.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, low profile of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the metallic legs along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other end of the sectional, with the armrest and the length of the seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat cushions and three back cushions, all uniform in size and attached, arranged in an L-shaped sectional configuration with a chaise lounge extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Low, straight armrests integrated into the sofa frame at both ends, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a minimalist, padded design.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, metallic legs with a slightly tapered profile, positioned at the corners and central support points, exposed and finished in silver.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with attached cushions, providing a uniform and streamlined appearance without tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
